asset.title: App Research Enrich
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview clearly demonstrates the account enrichment feature, showing the transition from pending to complete states with corresponding trace updates.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows the transition of account status from pending to complete with populated research data.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the before state, the enrichment action, and the final populated spreadsheet with trace logs.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed spreadsheet layout with clear visual hierarchy and distinct status indicators.

consistency.evidence: Integrates the spreadsheet view with the Room trace panel, aligning with the platform's core concepts.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time state changes and detailed agent execution logs.

legibility.evidence: Text in the spreadsheet cells and the trace log is legible at standard viewing sizes.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for GTM and sales operations workflows requiring automated company research.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the execution trace and data changes without artificial overlays.

observedEvidence: Spreadsheet interface with account names and pending statuses
Status change to complete with populated research text
Room trace log updating with agent execution details

defects.observed: The video remains static from 00:01 to 00:07 after the enrichment action completes.
defects.fix: Trim the trailing static frames to reduce the overall GIF file size.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Automate company research and enrich account lists using public and private NodeAgents, with full execution visibility in the Room trace.
